name: Tozzetti or Biscotti (Hazelnut Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly oil a large baking pan and dust with flour. Shake off excess flour.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, eggs, lemon rind, liqueur, and rum. Beat until thoroughly blended.
4. Beat in the hazelnuts (or almonds) and baking powder.
5. Using your hands, pick up half the dough and shape it into a long sausage shape. Arrange on the prepared baking pan off center and not too close to the edge of the pan. Arrange the other half alongside but not too close.
6. Bake in the oven for 1 hour.
7. Remove from the pan and let cool for 20 minutes.
8. Carefully and gently run a spatula or pancake turner under the two pastries. Let stand until almost at room temperature.
9. Using a serrated bread knife, cut each pastry into cross-wise slices, each about 1-inch thick.
10. Arrange these in one layer on a baking sheet and return to the oven to dry out, about 10 minutes.
11. Let cool and store. These cookies are improved if a little anisette or other anise-flavored liqueur is poured or brushed over them before serving.
